Qlik Sense server hostname

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Qlik Sense Licenses API

description.content:
REST API endpoints within the Qlik Sense Repository Service for managing licenses, license allocations, and user access types in Qlik Sense Enterprise. This API enables programmatic management of license enablement files (LEF), access type rules, and user license assignments including Professional, Analyzer, and Token access types.

Contact Support:
 Name: Qlik Support
